transcript: AI: Hello, this is a test call for roofing services. Homeowner: Hi, I have a leak in my roof. AI: Thank you. Can you confirm your address? Homeowner: 123 Fake Street, Test City. AI: Would you like to book an inspection? Homeowner: Yes, tomorrow afternoon works.
summary: Homeowner reported roof leak. Interested in inspection. Proposed appointment for tomorrow afternoon.
